title: App runs with debug=True bound to 0.0.0.0
evidence: app.py:183 app.run(debug=True, host='0.0.0.0', port=5000) — Werkzeug interactive debugger enables arbitrary code execution if the port is reachable
suggestion: Default debug=False and bind to 127.0.0.1; gate debug behind an env var

title: GET /books has no pagination
evidence: app.py:104 list_books returns the full table unconditionally
suggestion: Not required by TASK.md; add ?limit/?offset for large collections

title: No ISBN format validation or uniqueness constraint
evidence: app.py:76 INSERT stores isbn as-is; schema (app.py:38) has no UNIQUE on isbn
suggestion: Not required by TASK.md; consider validating/uniquing isbn if duplicates matter

title: Idiomatic/quality scores below par (idiomatic=0.68, code_quality=0.79)
evidence: scores.json: idiomatic=0.68, code_quality=0.7889 — module-level global app, repeated str(...).strip() blocks in create/update
suggestion: Factor shared validation/serialization helpers; use an app factory
